mapper.sql: id, template_name, msg_type, template_content, payload_version, payload_json, variables, remark, create_time, update_time, creator
mapper.select:
select
from message_template order by create_time DESC

select
from message_template where creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by create_time DESC

select
from message_template order by create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
